# Disk cleanup (Windows dev)

Flip Android builds need **≥ 10 GB free** on `C:`. When space drops below ~5 GB, run this checklist.

## Quick wins (safe)

```powershell
# From Flip repo root — stop Gradle/Java first
Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force

# Gradle caches (~5–10 GB typical)
Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$env:USERPROFILE\.gradle\caches" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$env:USERPROFILE\.gradle\daemon" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

# npm cache
npm cache clean --force

# Flip session logs (regenerated by dev-monitor)
Remove-Item logcat-live-session*.txt, logcat-tab-verify-*.txt, metro-live-session.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

# pip cache (if present)
pip cache purge 2>$null
```

## Android / Expo (regenerable)

| Path | Notes |
|------|-------|
| `%USERPROFILE%\.gradle\caches` | Safe after stopping Java |
| `%USERPROFILE%\.android\build-cache` | Safe |
| `Flip\android\build` | Rebuilt by `npm run android:dev` |
| `Flip\modules\flip-camerawesome\android\build` | Rebuilt on native compile |
| `Flip\.expo` | Cleared by `npm run start:clear` |

## Do NOT delete

- `Flip\` source tree (unless archived to GitHub first)
- `%LOCALAPPDATA%\Android\Sdk\` platform-tools / build-tools (re-download is slow)
- Signing keys (`*.jks`, `*.keystore`)

## Verify

```powershell
(Get-PSDrive C).Free / 1GB   # aim for ≥ 10
```

## Prevention

- Push branches regularly ([STORAGE_POLICY.md](./STORAGE_POLICY.md))
- Keep logcat/metro tails gitignored
- One Metro window on 8081 — avoid duplicate `node_modules` checkouts
